name: O-1 seed corpus: fp-examples/<rule-id>/examples.jsonl holds 30 pre-graded false-positive examples per existing rule
command: ok=0; bad=0; for d in "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/fp-examples"/*/; do [ -d "$d" ] || continue; n=$(wc -l < "$d/examples.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | tr -d ' '); if [ "$n" -ge 30 ]; then ok=$((ok+1)); else bad=$((bad+1)); fi; done; [ "$ok" -ge 1 ] && [ "$bad" -eq 0 ] && echo "per_rule_ok=$ok" 1>&2
